title: HIVE Digital Reports November 2025 Production of 290 BTC Achieves 25 EH/s
text: HIVE Digital Technologies reported November 2025 production of 290 BTC and achieved 25 EH/s of global mining capacity, as Tier III+ AI data center growth accelerates into 2026. The achievement of 25 EH/s represents roughly 2% of global Bitcoin network hashrate. Daily bitcoin production reached approximately 10 BTC per day based on monthly production figures. Bitcoin holdings continued to grow, with the company accumulating additional reserves through mining operations. The company emphasized that all bitcoin was mined using green hydroelectric energy, aligning with its sustainability commitments. Tier III+ AI data center expansion progressed ahead of schedule, with multiple facilities under development across Canada for GPU computing. Management highlighted that the company is transitioning to a true dual-engine business model with substantial revenue contributions from both Bitcoin mining and AI computing infrastructure.
